name: "The Cougar" - Taker of People Under 30
description:
"No."

-Jschlatt when the single mother of 3 asked for mercy.

Even though it's a guy in the thumbnail, this is anypov

Got kinda bored, remembered that someone wanted a cougar who's a cougar a while back, decided to do it.

Warning! Cougar spotted in area, men under 30 are advised not to travel alone!

Of course she's not gonna eat you or anything. She just wants your sausage and meatballs, along with whatever cream she can squeeze out of you.

Intro message might be a little lazy, wanted to get it out quicker
